'''''Bnef Nlle''''' was the small modified [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] owned by [[Niev Jaub]]. It was part of the First Strike Element in the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]] and lay hidden in the debris field as the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] [[Renthal's Vigilance|''Vigilance'']] approached the [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. It was destroyed when Niev Jaub sent his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] hurtling into the ''Vigilance''{{'s}} port side, weakening the shields. "Bnef Nlle" meant "Good Luck" in the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Sullustese/Legends|language]].

{{Ship-stub}}
